name: Satay II
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Boneless, skinless chicken breast or
1 lb Beef or lamb strips or
2 tsp Coriander seeds, toasted and ground
2 tsp Cumin seeds, toasted and ground
6 tbsp Tamarind water (made by soaking a 2 X 2 inch sq of tamarind in about 1/2 cup of water for 30 minutes, and then using the strained liquid)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into wide thin slices.
2. Cut these slices approximately 2 X 3/4 inch strips and thread them onto the skewers, leaving a handle of about 4 inches. (The skewered meat should be as flat and thin as possible)
3. Mix the marinade ingredients together.
4. Arrange the skewers in a shallow dish, handles overlapping, and pour the marinade over the meat.
5. Allow to stand for 30 to 60 minutes, turning from time to time.
6. Start your coals now.
7. To grill the chicken, cook about 1 minute on each side (do not overcook) and serve with peanut sauce.
